overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character exploring a coastal fishing village during a stormy dusk. The character walks along wooden stilt docks, passes fishermen on a moored boat, and ventures into tall grass along the shoreline.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden fishing dock with traditional stilt houses

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wooden dock past traditional Japanese stilt houses with mossy roofs

entered.detail: traditional wooden stilt house with green moss-covered thatched roof and weathered timber walls
weathered wooden planks forming the walking surface of the fishing pier
large fishing net draped over bamboo poles near the house
traditional Japanese lantern with warm flame hanging from a wooden pole
stacked wicker baskets used for storing fish and equipment

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow wooden fishing dock flanked by traditional stilt houses with mossy roofs. Fishing nets hang from bamboo poles and wicker baskets sit on the dock, while lanterns provide warm light against the overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open water pier with moored fishing boat

events.description: passing by a moored fishing boat with crew members standing on the deck
approaching the end of the pier where bright sunlight breaks through clouds and reflects off the water

agents.ego_description: walking along the pier toward the open water, approaching a moored fishing boat with visible crew

notable_agents.action: group of fishermen standing on a moored boat, handling fishing equipment and observing the surroundings

entered.detail: wooden fishing boat moored to the dock with several NPC crew members visible on deck
long wooden bridge or pier structure visible in the far distance across the water

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the dock past a moored fishing boat where fishermen stand on the deck. The stilt houses fall behind as the pier extends toward open water, with a distant bridge visible on the horizon and bright sunlight beginning to glare off the water's surface.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunlit pier end with bright water reflection

events.description: character turns around at the end of the pier to walk back toward the village
strong backlighting from the setting sun creates a silhouette effect as the character faces the water

agents.ego_description: turning around at the pier's end to walk back, silhouetted against the bright sun reflecting off the water

segments.scene_description: At the end of the pier, the character turns around, now facing directly into the bright sun which creates a dramatic silhouette. The fishing boat is now behind, and the stilt houses appear small in the distance ahead as the character begins the return walk.

scene_state.functional_zone: returning along the dock toward the stilt houses

events.description: passing the moored fishing boat again while walking back toward the village
turning left off the wooden dock into the tall grass area along the shore

agents.ego_description: walking back along the dock past the fishing boat, then turning left into the tall grass along the shoreline

notable_agents.action: fishermen on the moored boat watching the character walk past on the return journey

entered.detail: tall golden reeds and grass growing along the edge of the dock

segments.scene_description: Walking back along the dock, the character passes the fishing boat again, now on the left side, and approaches the stilt houses from the opposite direction. The character then turns off the wooden planks into tall grass growing along the water's edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: tall grass coastal path alongside the water

events.description: fully entering the grassy terrain, leaving the wooden dock behind

agents.ego_description: walking through tall reeds and grass along the water's edge, moving away from the fishing village into the natural landscape

entered.detail: line of trees with autumn foliage visible across the water in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character moves through dense tall grass along the shoreline, leaving the wooden structures of the fishing village behind. The landscape opens up to reveal distant autumn trees across the water while the dock and buildings recede into the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a coastal fishing village that transitions from a sheltered dockside path into an open, natural shoreline. It begins with the character walking along a narrow wooden dock lined with mossy stilt houses, hanging nets, and warm lanterns under an overcast sky. As the pier extends toward the open water, the houses recede and the lighting shifts dramatically, culminating in a bright solar glare that silhouettes the character as they turn around at the water's edge. The camera then tracks the return journey past a moored fishing boat and the village structures before turning off the wooden planks. Finally, the scene opens up as the character moves through dense tall grass along the shoreline, leaving the village behind to reveal distant autumn trees across the water.
